## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Docs (`docs:`)
- [ ] CI / build / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/config/annotations changed
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (drives the release-plz version bump)
